- Enterprise analytics coming: workflow progression, time-between-steps, lead status — not traditional funnel metrics
- Post-April: buyer/seller matching (private MLS via AI), then full loan application
- Prefers learn-from-pilots approach before scaling to bigger prospects (aligned with Dan)

- HELOC: Ramon Walker has a lead type for it, but Conrad not going deep — just basic qualification
- UWM full loan app API already in hand — gap is the middle pieces between pre-approval and full app. Not far off but Leo won't rush it
